entry.title: Re: A WT delimited, and,first payroll after Rehire errore...
entry.content:
You will need to modify the earliest master data change date and master date for change to bonus on the Payroll Status infotype to align with the rehire action - this will mean that the earlier changes are not taken into account.

You can also consider changing the earliest retroactive change date so backdated changes won't be considered going forward should they subsequently appear.

Lastly, a review of if any payments/deductions against the previous employment should be undertaken and either handled via an offline process, or brought into the current employment period.

entry.title: SAP certification subscription for an individual
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

As an individual, I want to purchase the Learning HUB subscription. I want to schedule my exam for SAP Financial Accounting.

what is the procedure to purchase the subscription as an individual, please need your support and guidance.

Is it possible in Saudi Arabia especially, and my S-user ID is from HCL Tech.

 

Regards,
Babu.

Certification SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management

entry.title: Re: BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE Multiple Account Assignment
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it resolved if yes please let me know we are also facing same error

entry.title: Re: Table control: column visible length is zero
entry.content:
I was having the same situation were the length of column 'Requisitioner' in PO was set to zero and field grayed-out, after using the 'Delete' option in 'Edit system settings' screen it went back to normal.

Thank you!

entry.title: Unable to delete PSA - Control cycle WM Production Supply (Release order part) SAP R3
entry.content:
Hello,

 I`m trying to delete unused PSA`s (PK05) but i receive info that is still used in control cycles - PK371 error and a material number. 

 I did go to MM03 for the material - nothing, LPK4 and delete control cycles for the PSA, LS02N for storage bin, LS11 for supply area .

After all the above i went back to LPK4 , same error ....

In LS41 i still see overview pf control cycles for WM Production Supply (status Release order part). I`m out of ideas on how to get rid of the PSA`s . 

Thank you !

entry.title: Re: LMS: Due Date based on the completion date of another...
entry.content:
We have one ITEM B which needs to be assigned once ITEM A is completed 2 years ago.

This is TEST Certification which users should completes post 2 years of ITEM A Completion.

How we can manage to Auto assignement of ITEM B post 2 years of ITEM A Completion .

Also ITEM A is already assigned via one curriculum

entry.title: Voting Needed for SuccessFactors TIH Improvement Requests
entry.content:
Dear all,

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to request your support in voting for two improvement requests related to SuccessFactors TIH & 360

  1. Selective Behavior Rating in 360 Feedback Form
    Vote Here
    The current configuration of the 360 Feedback Form in SuccessFactors requires all behaviors associated with a competency to be included in the rating process. This lack of flexibility can lead to irrelevant or excessive feedback, which may dilute the focus on critical behaviors that are most pertinent to an employee's development. If job codes or job profiles are not in use, there is no possibility to select the behaviours which should be available in a 360.

  2. Multi-Competency Behavior Assignment in Talent Intelligence Hub
    Vote Here
    Currently, the Talent Intelligence Hub in SuccessFactors restricts behaviors to a one-to-one association with competencies. This limitation hinders the ability to accurately reflect the multifaceted nature of competencies that often share common behaviors. As a result, organizations struggle to create a comprehensive and realistic competency framework that aligns with their strategic goals and employee development plans.

Thank you for your support!

entry.title: LDAP.js Error: LdapErr:DSID-0C060810
entry.content:
I am working on an SAP BTP CAP app that integrates with Active Directory using LDAP.js. The connection to the LDAP server works fine for most requests, but occasionally, we encounter the following error:

LdapErr: DSID-0C060810, comment: No other operations may be performed on the connection while a bind is outstanding., data 0, v3839

What we are doing:
1. We have an API endpoint that calls the ldap.searchAD() function.
2. The code ensures that operations like binding, searching, and unbinding are performed sequentially using a mutex to serialize the requests.

Code:
API endpoint:

```
const { Mutex } = require('async-mutex');
const mutex = new Mutex();

apicall.on('searchAD', async (req) => {
const release = await mutex.acquire();
try {
return await ldap.getUserInfo(req.data.username);
} catch (error) {
req.error({
code: 400,
message: `${error.message}`
});
} finally {
release();
}
});

```

searchAD function:

```
async function searchAD (attributesToRead) {
return callLdap(
LDAP_CONFIG.base,
LDAP_CONFIG.scope,
`(&(objectClass=user)(sAMAccountName=${attributesToRead}))`
)
.then() // processing
.catch(error => {
logger.error('Error fetching users Details');
throw error; // Re-throw the error to propagate it
});
}

```

callLdap function:

```
async function callLdap(base, scope, filter) {
try {
const client = await createLdapClient();
return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
const entries = [];
client.search(base, {
scope: scope,
filter: filter,
paged: false
}, async (err, res) => {
if (err) {
logger.error('Search error in searchLdap:', err);
await client.unbind();
reject(err);
}
res.on('searchEntry', (entry) => {
entries.push({
jsonData: JSON.stringify(entry.object)
});
});
res.on('error', async (err_1) => {
await client.unbind();
reject(err_1);
});
res.on('end', async (result) => {
await client.unbind();
resolve(entries);
});
res.on('close', async (result_1) => {
await client.unbind();
reject(new Error('Socket closed'));
});
});
});
} catch (error) {
throw error;
}
}

```

createLdapClient function:

```
const ldap = require('ldapjs'); // Version: "^2.3.3"
async function createLdapClient(options) {
const ldapClient = ldap.createClient({
url: ldapUrl,
tlsOptions: { ...tlsOptions, socket: info.socket }
});

return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
ldapClient.bind(options.bindUser, options.bindPass, (err) => {
if (err) {
ldapClient.unbind();
return reject(err);
}
logger.info('Bound to LDAP server');
});

ldapClient.on('connect', () => {
resolve(ldapClient); // Resolve when connection is successful
});

ldapClient.on('error', (err) => {
reject(err); // Reject on error
});
});
}

```
What we’ve tried:
- Mutex Implementation: We are using a mutex to ensure only one LDAP request is processed at a time. This includes connection establishment, search, and unbinding operations.
- Client Unbind: We ensure the LDAP client is properly unbound after each operation.

Problem:
Even with the mutex in place, the following error occurs intermittently:
`LdapErr: DSID-0C060810, comment: No other operations may be performed on the connection while a bind is outstanding., data 0, v3839
`

 

 

 

 

What we’ve tried:
- Mutex Implementation: We are using a mutex to ensure only one LDAP request is processed at a time. This includes connection establishment, search, and unbinding operations.
- Client Unbind: We ensure the LDAP client is properly unbound after each operation.

Problem:
Even with the mutex in place, the following error occurs intermittently:
`LdapErr: DSID-0C060810, comment: No other operations may be performed on the connection while a bind is outstanding., data 0, v3839
`
This error indicates that an operation is being attempted while the LDAP bind is still in progress, even though the mutex is supposed to ensure sequential execution.

Questions:
- What could be causing this intermittent error?
- Is there a potential issue with the LDAP.js connection handling, or is it related to how the mutex is implemented?
- How can we further ensure that the bind operation is completely finished before any subsequent operations are executed?

Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: How to assign multiple batches to one SFC in discrete...
entry.content:
Hi Koichi,

The following Order, Batch, SFC relationship can only be achieved in Order POD at the moment, see Executing Discrete Production Orders in Order POD within SAP Digital Manufacturing to learn how you can execute discrete production orders in Order POD.

Work Center / Operation Activity PODs will always report Goods Receipt to the planned batch in the production order header, at the moment.

Hope it helps! Br,
Manoel

entry.title: SAP ECTR Client Encyrption in locally stored files/documents
entry.content:
Hi,

I understand that the SAP ECTR client temporarily stores locally in the working directory of the client workstation a copy of the file/document locally in the client in the check-out and check-in process. 

We have a security requirement to encrypt files stored locally (at rest) on the client workstation, even though they are only temporarily stored.   

Does SAP have a method to implement encryption on the file at rest?  If there is none, is there a roadmap to to build this feature?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: [SAC] Values ​​using the formula RESTRICT cannot be d...
entry.content: You can add a new VDT-Widget to the story and then simply use the Auto-Create feature and select the relevant accounts. This should also bring in your restricted account. More info on VDT creation is available here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/f6189755175940f3a4e007c3d6b83ee5.html?q=VDT

entry.title: A/P Invoice
entry.content:
Hi

  Is it possible that if any a/p down payment of Vendor is pending then its amount should automatically get appeared in Total Down Payment column in A/p Invoice through FMS or any other way.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Please remove the targetMonth parameter from your data statement, it should be DATA([d/Measures] = "VB") only. The target is now already defined and set by your Memberset-Statement.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict employees from recording timesheet af...
entry.content: Hi @Volker_Ruof, thanks for the response, really appreciate the solution provided. Additionally, it would be very helpful if you could attach any document or reference material to aid the configuration of this case.

entry.content:
Could you please share how to raise an error message from BADI /SCWM/EX_PRNT_PDF_HU, which can set the error flag to X, so the messages get recorded in the PPF log, which will help the user to understand the issue is from BADI custom logic?

Function Module:  /SCWM/EXECUTE_PPF_HU_PDF

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Business Content MM
entry.content: Thank you....

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Business Content MM
entry.content: Thanl you...

entry.title: Re: Restrict Business Users from Deleting Contacts becaus...
entry.content:
Is it an option to tell the users that they must not delete contacts button in the contacts app, and offer an alternative method for deletions?

We have segmentation models for the contact deletions. The model determines a Live Target Group*, and then there are some daily Admin Jobs running. The first job is "remove marketing area from contacts" which will remove one marketing area from contacts that were selected with that segmentation. The second job is "flag contacts for deletion by target group", which uses a live target group that selects only contacts that do not have ANY marketing area left. And then of course the actual "delete flagged contacts" job.

 

*The segmentation models that are to be used for the deletion selection must contain enough branches so the users can use the criteria they need. Usually in our case, they just use the branch "email address equals". And they enter the email addresses of contacts that they want to have deleted.

 

I hope this might help.

entry.title: Re: How to create a segmentation profile where contacts h...
entry.content:
Could you use Business Role restrictions instead?

If a user has restrictions on country and on marketing area, they would only see and be able to segment on those in the segmentation models.

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content: no, it will take over the old url, you don't have to change odata url in your ui.

entry.title: Re: Authorization problem with /SCWM/MON or not?
entry.content:
Hello,
I have found the solution. The user has a role in which the authorization object /SCWM/MO contained authorization fields with “#” instead of “*”. After changing “#” to “*” in the authorization fields, it worked. The user was still able to access the warehouse monitor because the authorization object was set correctly in another role.

Greetings

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
Hi Britt,

Since Nov 15 you can replicate the exchange rates from S/4 to CIM. I suppose the system is expecting that you do that when it refers to missing configuration. 

See the latest setup guide for the 4N6 scope item and refer to 10.4.1.1.6.6 Configure Distribution Model in SAP Master Data Orchestration for Exchange Rate.

Did you set up this replication?

 

Best,

Jeroen

entry.title: Accessing $skip/$top inside Odata Batch requests in CAP Nodejs
entry.content:
Hi community,

I'm trying to figure out the correct way to access the $skip and $top query parameters on a request that's inside a $batch request. The reason is, that I need to transform those parameters and pass the request on to a remote system.

this.on('READ', Contents, async (req: Request) => {
  ...
}

 

 

I tried req.query and req.http.req.query but both only return {}.

While debugging, I found that the following ways work but are undocumented, so I'm not sure if it's safe to use them.

console.log(req.req.query)   // {'$skip': '0', '$top': '20'}
console.log(req._.req.query) // {'$skip': '0', '$top': '20'}

Any recommendations?

entry.title: Confirme Dates with SAP DM
entry.content:
We are using production orders with Order PODs in SAP DM.

Currently we are only confirming the dates/times for "Start of Exectuion" and "Finsih Exectuion". See picture attached. These confirmations are set with the standard integration flow. Can we confirm the additonal times like "Finish Setup" and "Start Processing"? Is ist possible with the standard integrationf flows or do we need custom integration flows?

entry.title: How to extend the size of an Existing table using ABAP2XLSX
entry.content:
Subject: Extending the Size of an Existing Table with ABAP2XLSX

Body:

Hello everyone,

I'm working with ABAP2XLSX and need help extending the size of an existing table.

For example, I have a table with 5 columns and 2 rows, and I want to expand it to 20 rows. How can I achieve this?

Any suggestions or advice would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: BAPI /SCWM/MFG_RECEIVE_HUS_EXT to Receive HUs for EWM...
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using /SCWM/MFG_RECEIVE_HUS_EXT without any problem in S/4 with EWM embedded.

Regards,

entry.title: Where can I learn SAP Quote-to-Cash and SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management (BRIM)?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering the capabilities of SAP Solutions for Quote-to-Cash Management private cloud (BRIM) for Solution Architects learning journey.

Overview
This course provides a comprehensive description of the Quote-to-Cash process utilizing SAP CPQ and SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management (BRIM). The integrated suite offers an end-to-end flow for:

  • Configuring products and prices
  • Creating quotes and contracts
  • Managing rating, billing, and invoicing of subscription and usage-based revenue streams
  • Handling financial contract accounting and revenue accounting processes for high-volume business models

The training gives a deep drive about SAP CPQ, SAP Subscription Order Management, SAP Convergent Mediation, SAP Convergent Charging, SAP Convergent Invoicing, SAP Financial Contract Accounting and SAP Revenue Accounting and Reporting.
The focus of the training is on the integration of the SAP components across the end-to-end business process.
The course is designed for consultants and solution architects.

Learning objectives
After completing this lesson, you should be able to:

  • Get an overview about subscription and usage-based business model 
  • Know how SAP CPQ supports Quotation process with BRIM Integration
  • Understand the integration of the relevant SAP master data objects: Quote, Business Partner, Contract Account, Product, Solution Quotation
  • Understand Master Agreement process
  • Provide  an overview of the integration of Convergent Mediation
  • Determine the role of convergent charging in complex price modelling.
  • Understand process of Consumption Items in rating, billing and invoicing
  • Outline the document life cycle of an FI-CA document 
  • Understand how Revenue Accounting and Reporting is integrated in system landscape of BRIM

 

Prerequisites

  • Discovering the capabilities of SAP Solutions for Quote-to-Cash Management private cloud (BRIM) for Business User

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Operating a multi-tenant solution on BTP CF - 1 GB Ru...
entry.content: ACC testing sample

entry.title: Re: How to restrict employees from recording timesheet af...
entry.content: @Aratrika_Bardhan: I don´t have a document. It is not rocket science, just try it out in the system. The effective date entry is a date that falls into a time sheet period - and for this time sheet you can then set a date before which a retroactive change is not possible. If you have 12 payroll periods for example you need to enter 12 dates into ths table.

Hello @asahinsar,

ERROR => DpHdlDeadWp: W0 (pid 214580) died

You need to check the dev_w0 trace file to verify why the instance could not start.

Regards,

Isaías

entry.title: validation rule to prevent the user from selecting a date greater than current date or System date
entry.content:
Hello experts,

While creating validation in Manage Substitution and Validation Rules in S4Hana public cloud (2408) rule to prevent the user from selecting a date greater than current date or System date when I give Posting date in Field/Function value will show the calendar to select the date and will not take condition <= SYST-DATUM

Below are the inputs I am giving while creating validation role

 

  • Field/Function: Posting Date
  • Operator: <=
  • Value: SYST-DATUM

 

Its giving below error

The value SY-DATUM of field PostingDate has a wrong format and cannot be processed.

Kindly suggest me how to give the validation role.

entry.title: Re: "Number Range Status" in T code: SNUM
entry.content:
1) The status is the last number assigned. I am not sure why you cannot find the document. It could be that you should double check what document type or company code the number range is assigned to. 

2. Yes. the configuration for the number range object in SNUM defaults to providing an alert when 10% remains.

3. Correct, SAP will block creation of any further documents using that number range. This this will be a production down situation if you run out of numbers.

4. The solution depends on the number range object. For RF_BELEG (FI Document Number), you can restart the numbers each year. For others, you'll need to estimate the number of documents for each document type and plan accordingly. It may be that you have room to simply increase the "TO" number in the range. In other cases, you may need to plan for a new, larger number range to be assigned to the document type.  For our Finance number ranges, we have a master list documented outside the system and controlled by a single Finance IT team to avoid conflicts.

For any doc type, you theoretically can archive documents to free up numbers; but, I think it would be rare that you'd free up a large block of sequential numbers. If the same doc number exists when trying to post, the system will fail.

entry.title: Re: JAVA Connector 3.1

entry.content:

I observed the following behaviour when using Action Projects in processes.

The Output from the Action doesn't correspond to the output defined in the Action Project:

Action Project:

 Action in Process:

The Version is the same and the Action Project was created from an IFlow from CPI. Is this a bug or did I do something wrong?

entry.title: Re: In the twilights of a Career Journey
entry.content:

Can you share more about that?

Sebas

entry.title: Re: Schedule Post Closing and Opening Balances - Italy
entry.content:
Hi Kamil,

Checking into the following SAP Help Portal documentation,

Schedule Post Closing and Opening Balances | SAP Help Portal

There is no special description for the ledger relevant to be emphasized.

And according to the test script J58 which is included in following link, it also does not have any specification for ledgers.

Process Navigator - SAP for Me

Fixed asset posting for new year may check the yearly closing completed or not.

Normally we suggest customer conduct the year-end closing for all ledgers since the beginning balance should be accurate for reporting.

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Re: A WT delimited, and,first payroll after Rehire errore...
entry.content:
Hi Sri,

You already suggested the approach I would take. Reactivate, then clean-up master data for active and term'd EEs, the delimit again. Iveseen this with wage types, benefit plans, other config, etc.

If you have an ABAPer hanging around somewhere, there might be a way to access the table directly via SE16 or SE16n and change the EDNDA via an ABAP debug session.

Cheers,

Brandyn

entry.title: What is planned for the 2502 release of SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing?
entry.content:
The 2502 release of SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing is planned to be deployed to BTP customer tenants on January 22, 2025:

Administration UI and Administration service:

Release

Test/Non-Productive & Productive Upgrades

2502

January 22, 2025

Variant Configuration service & Pricing service:

Release

Test/Non-productive Upgrade

Productive Upgrade

2502

January 22, 2025

February 5, 2025

 

This blog covers the following planned innovations:

  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Staged Deployment Strategy
  • Configuration and Pricing Services – EU Access
  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Support X.509 Certificates
  • Pricing service – Change the Source of a Pricing Document
  • Pricing service – Calculation Status for Stateless Pricing
  • Pricing service – Return Condition Record Validity
  • Pricing service – Access Sales Records in Purchasing Tables
  • Pricing service – Support Standard Requirement Formulas 58 and 67
  • Pricing service – Custom Implementation of Unsupported Standard Routines
  • Pricing service – Consider Condition Record Descriptions
  • Pricing service – Support Initial Variant Condition Keys
  • Pricing service – Base Calculations Include Current Percentage Step
  • Variant Configuration service – Raise Conflict for Non-Unique Inferences from Multiple Rows of a Variant Table
  • Variant Configuration service – New Filter to Read Variant Table Content
  • Variant Configuration service – New API to Read Details of Single Characteristics
  • Administration – Delta Replication Alert for SAP Cloud ALM

Please check the updated roadmap and release notes after the release date to see which of these features were delivered as planned.

 

Disclaimer

The information in this presentation is confidential and proprietary to SAP and may not be disclosed without the permission of SAP.
Except for your obligation to protect confidential information, this presentation is not subject to your license agreement or any other service or subscription agreement with SAP. SAP has no obligation to pursue any course of business outlined in this presentation or any related document, or to develop or release any functionality mentioned therein.

This presentation, or any related document and SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice. The information in this presentation is not a commitment, promise or legal obligation to deliver any material, code or functionality.  This presentation is provided without a warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. This presentation is for informational purposes and may not be incorporated into a contract. SAP assumes no responsibility for errors or omissions in this presentation, except if such damages were caused by SAP’s intentional or gross negligence.

All forward-looking statements are subject to various risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially from expectations. Readers are cautioned not to place undue reliance on these forward-looking statements, which speak only as of their dates,
and they should not be relied upon in making purchasing decisions.

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – Staged Deployment Strategy

There is a new staged deployment strategy for the Variant Configuration service and the Pricing service starting with the 2502 release. In the past, new software releases used to be deployed to all customer tenants at the same time. We will continue to do that for our administration UI and our Administration service, but for the configuration and pricing services we will first deploy the 2502 release only to all non-productive tenants (including the partner tenants) on January 22 2025, and two weeks later, on February 5, we will also deploy it to the productive tenants.

Action: It is recommended to familiarize with the Release Schedule and Dates on our product page. Please review the changes in the Pre-Production version of the documentation that will be published on January 22, and use the given two weeks to test the new release in your non-productive tenants and process the actions of the recommended or required changes that are announced here and in the release notes.

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – EU Access

SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing will support EU Access tenants after the February release. A special entitlement will be required for EU Access. This will only be available if the SAP customer has signed a contract that specifically includes EU Access.

Data processed by SAP is subject to restrictions in line with standard Cloud service contracts in SAP’s General Terms and Conditions (GTC). The objective of EU Access is to keep SAP's processing of customer personal data within the EEA and Switzerland only.

For such contracts, where the BTP global account is marked with EU Access, the actual EU Access compliance status of subaccounts will be displayed during the creation of subaccounts.

If you require a subaccount with EU Access, make sure to select a provider and region where EU Access is available. For SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing, this will have to be AWS Europe (Frankfurt) EU Access, cf-eu11.

All SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing tenants of a customer must be subscribed in one region and operated by the same infrastructure provider. AWS Europe (Frankfurt) cf-eu10 is a different region than AWS Europe (Frankfurt) EU Access cf-eu11! It is not supported to run different tenants of the same customer in those different regions. The region also defines the infrastructure provider. It is not supported either to run the different tenants on different infrastructure providers like Amazon Web Services or Azure. It is not possible to switch the region or the provider for existing tenants. It is not possible to move subaccounts and tenants across regions.

Created-by and changed-by fields in the administration UI and in the response of some endpoints of the Administration service will remain empty when used on AWS Europe (Frankfurt) EU Access, cf-eu11, while in other regions they will continue to have user ids or email addresses.

The Data Transfer Factsheet and the List of sub processors will be updated after the February release.

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – Support X.509 Certificates

To obtain an OAuth token to call an endpoint of a cloud service, the client id and the client secret must be provided which can be found in the service's service key or service binding. Instead of the client secret, an X.509 certificate can now be used.

Action: Using X.509 certificates is considered more secure than using client secrets. It is recommended to use the new approach. Using external or self-managed certificates also enables simplified certificate rotation.  

More information will be published in the Security Guide (Pre-Production) and the Administration Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

Pricing service – Change the Source of a Pricing Document

When creating a new pricing document with the endpoint POST /documents, the owner or the source of the document can be specified. The source application, the source type; for example, quote, and the source id; for example, the quote’s transaction number, can be passed and are stored with the pricing document.

The source information can be used as a filter criteria in the APIs to manage stored pricing documents.

With the February release, the enhanced endpoint PATCH /documents will allow overwriting the source of a document in addition to the document currency and exchange rate details:

Overwrite the Source

No partial updates are possible, it is required to provide all the source information: application, type, and id.

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

Pricing service – Calculation Status for Stateless Pricing

We will enhance endpoint POST /statelesspricing with the new response fields calculationStatus and messages that are already known from document pricing.

The new fields will indicate whether the price calculation was completed successfully, with warnings, or with errors. The status is determined based on the severity of the generated messages, which are detailed in the messages field. These messages will be available at both the document level and at the item level and can include warnings or error information:

Pricing Status

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

Pricing service – Return Condition Record Validity

We will enhance endpoint POST /statelesspricing and GET /documents with the new response structure validity for the returned item conditions.

The new structure will expose the start and end dates of the used condition records:

Item Condition's Validity

This allows the calling applications to display how long a certain price or discount can still be guaranteed.

More information will be published in the API Definition with the February release.

 

Pricing service – Access Sales Records in Purchasing Tables

Only condition tables and condition records with application ‘V’ (Sales) are considered by the Pricing service.

For cases in which condition records with application 'V' are stored in condition tables that belong to application 'M' (Purchasing), customers must ensure that the necessary tables are correctly handled in the replication. If an access sequence uses relevant condition tables (A-tables) belonging to application 'M' (as identified in the table T681), customers need to reload the table T681 and the corresponding A-tables.

The Pricing service will then also consider the condition records with application 'V' in such condition tables with application 'M'.

More information will be published in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

Pricing service – Support Standard Requirement Formulas 58 and 67

Newly supported standard requirement formula 58 will return true if the accounting indicator (pricing attribute KOMP-BEMOT) is not initial.

Newly supported standard requirement formula 67 will always return true in the context of the Pricing service. Background: If the "exclusive" indicator is set in the access sequence, it ensures that once a condition record is found for any of the relevant contracts (for multi-value attributes), no further steps in the access sequence are processed. However, by using this requirement formula in the access sequence, the condition access can continue to the next step, while filtering out contracts for which condition records have already been found. This behavior is enabled by setting the flag “continue_for_mva” to “true” in the back end but this is the default behavior in pricing, hence the standard requirement formula always returns true.

More information will be published in Supported Standard Pricing Exits (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

Pricing service - Custom Implementation for Unsupported Standard Routines

Not all standard pricing routines that are available in the back end are also available in Pricing service. See also Supported Standard Pricing Exits.

If needed, customers can request the implementation of a missing routine, but SAP might reject this, because the routine is not considered as relevant for the use cases that the Pricing service addresses.

In such a case, SAP can allow and enable the customer to use the Pricing service’s extension concept to implement the standard pricing routine on a project-basis. It will also be possible to overwrite already supported standard routines like this. If needed, please create a customer ticket on component LOD-CPS-PRC.

More information will be published in the Extension Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

Pricing service – Consider Condition Record Descriptions

For certain back-end releases it is possible to maintain a description on the condition record level:

Condition Record Description

That description is displayed in the pricing results instead of the condition type description, but only for non-variant conditions.

The Pricing service will support the same mechanism. This feature will only be activated on request through a customer ticket on component LOD-CPS-PRC.

Table KONPT will be added to the list of replicated tables for the Pricing service.

More information will be published in the API Definition and the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

Pricing service – Support Initial Variant Condition Keys

When the VARCOND key field in an access was flagged as Initial Value Allowed and a condition record with an empty variant condition key was maintained, the Pricing service used to return different results from the pricing in SAP S/4HANA. This issue has been corrected.

A VARCOND key field in an access can be flagged as Initial Value Allowed:

Initial Value Allowed

A condition record for such a variant condition is maintained without a condition key:

Condition Record

Nevertheless, when the Pricing service is called with 3 variant condition keys, it is expected that the condition record is determined and applied 3 times.
And if the condition keys were provided with different pricing factors, then the correct pricing factor must be applied for each of the 3 price elements.

Example pricing call with 3 variant condition keys:

 

 

"variantConditions": [
        {
          "factor": 1,
          "key": "CHEESE"
        },
        {
          "factor": 3,
          "key": "2ndPATY"
        },
        {
          "factor": 2,
          "key": "BACON"
        },
]

 

 

 

Behavior before the fix:

Condition Type

Counter

Condition Rate

Condition Base

Condition Value

Variant Key

Variant Factor

PR00

1

7 EUR

1

7 EUR

 

 

VAIN

1

0,30 EUR

1

0,30 EUR

 

1

 

Behavior after the fix:

Condition Type

Counter

Condition Rate

Condition Base

Condition Value

Variant Key

Variant Factor

PR00

1

7 EUR

1

7 EUR

 

 

VAIN

1

0,30 EUR

1

0,30 EUR

 CHEESE

1

VAIN

2

0,30 EUR

3

0,90 EUR

 2ndPATY

3

VAIN

3

0,30 EUR

2

0,60 EUR

 BACON

2

 

Pricing service – Base Calculations Include Current Percentage Step

In scenarios where a percentage condition (e.g., KA00) spans multiple counters within the same step range in the pricing procedure, the condition base was not dynamically adjusted to account for the cumulative effect of prior conditions. Instead, all counters for the condition type used the original base amount.

For example: When the From and To fields for the condition type KA00 in the pricing procedure specify the same step (e.g., From: 10, To: 20), and KA00 is applied as a percentage condition, all counters used the same condition base (100 EUR in this case), leading to identical condition values (-5 EUR) regardless of previous adjustments.

With the fix, the system will adjust the condition base step by step when calculating values for percentage conditions like KA00. Each counter now reflects the impact of the previous ones, ensuring accurate calculations within the specified step range.

 Behavior before the fix:

Condition Type

Counter

Condition Rate

Condition Base

Condition Value

PR00

1

100 EUR

1

100 EUR

KA00

1

-5%

100 EUR

-5 EUR

KA00

2

-5%

100 EUR

-5 EUR

KA00

3

-5%

100 EUR

-5 EUR

Behavior after the fix:

Condition Type

Counter

Condition Rate

Condition Base

Condition Value

PR00

1

100 EUR

1

100 EUR

KA00

1

-5%

100 EUR

-5 EUR

KA00

2

-5%

95 EUR

-4.75 EUR

KA00

3

-5%

90.25 EUR

-4.51 EUR

 

 

Variant Configuration service – Raise Conflict for Non-Unique Inferences from Multiple Rows of a Variant Table

When a characteristic value could not be set, because a select on a variant table resulted in more than one row, an exception used to be raised and the configuration service endpoint responded with an error. This behavior will be changed by no longer raising an exception but signaling a conflict in the configuration results in the same way as LO-VC does it.

 

Variant Configuration service – New Filter to Read Variant Table Content

We will enhance endpoint GET /knowledgebases/{kbId}/variantTables/{variantTableId} with a new IN operator for the $filter parameter that will allow more advanced table selects in the form of $filter=<characteristic name> IN (<list of characteristic values>).

Examples:

  • $filter=COLOR IN (‘RED’, ‘GREEN’, ‘BLUE’)
  • $filter=(SIZE IN (‘L’, ‘XL’, ‘XXL’) AND COLOR EQ ‘PURPLE’)

Operator: IN

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

Variant Configuration service – New API to Read Details of Single Characteristics

New endpoint GET /configurations/{configurationId}/items/{itemId}/characteristics to read the details of one or more characteristics of an item:

Request

Response

Action: If the UI of the consuming application allows it, it is recommended to always read the configuration results during interactive configurations without the possible values of characteristics. This can be achieved by using the $select parameter omitting the parameter value possibleValue when creating or reading a configuration. When the user clicks on a UI element like a dropdown list box, that requires to render the possible values on the UI, only then the possible values should be read for that characteristic using the new endpoint. This will improve performance especially when AVC Forwarding is enabled.

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

 

Administration – Delta Replication Alert for SAP Cloud ALM

The alert for a too high number of deltas is now also sent to SAP Cloud Application Lifecycle Monitoring – Integration Monitoring.

More information will be published in the Administration Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

With that, you have a good overview of what innovations are planned for the February release. Please check the updated roadmap and release notes after the release date to see which of these features were delivered as planned.

entry.title: Push all individual records in a single mail
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am getting response from the receiver system as individual records(one by one), Now I just want to send all the records at a time in a single mail.

I know we can achieve this using gather option, but I want to achieve this using data store operation.

I just tried with write and select data store operations but select operation is triggering multiple times whenever the record is coming but I want it to trigger after getting all records.

Could anyone help me on this?

Thanks,

Pavan Koppula

entry.title: Re: BRSPACE setup for Oracle standby database
entry.content:
Hi,

This is a setup issue for sure. BRSPACE (and all BR*Tools executable) has to access the database to document its activities. Meaning must have access to database tables. Only BRBACKUP and BRRESTORE is meant to be executed on the Standby database other actions must be performed on the primary and in case of a correct setup, all changes are getting reflected on the Standby automatically.

Make sure Oracle parameters like "log_file_name_convert" and "db_file_name_convert" are correctly set across this DataGuard setup.

entry.title: SAP Sapphire & ASUG Annual Conference Orlando
entry.content:
We are inviting you get the latest for the event in 2025!

Please complete and submit the form and we will be in touch once plans for SAP Sapphire & ASUG Annual Conference Orlando in 2025 have been finalized and registration opens.

We are looking forward to meeting you at the SAP Sapphire & ASUG Annual Conference in Orlando.

entry.title: Re: Push all individual records in a single mail
entry.content: You should look into a looping process call instead of the splitter then.

entry.title: City Code - Postal code - street
entry.content:
hi,

via SR10 you can create a city number and link it with postal codes

via SR20 you can create a streetnumber and link it with a city number.

How can I make the link between a street and a specific postal code of that city number?

kr

Nico

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content: Can you explain why u think the original URL would not change? When we have redefined the Service its a new URL

entry.title: Re: How to restrict employees from recording timesheet af...
entry.content: Hi @Volker_Ruof, thanks again for the information. Will try it out and hope it works as expected.

entry.title: Assign equipment class automatically when creating serial number/ equipment
entry.content:
Dear all,

How to enable the assignment of the equipment class automatically for serial number/ equipment?
Now the equipment class have been assigned manually in IE02 for all serial numbers. As per our business process we create serial numbers within production order and it would be difficult to assign equipment class manual to every seril number if one of the production order has more than 50-100 pieces.
It would be very helpful if the equipment classes were automatically assigned when the equipment is created. As we find out that for batch classification it is possible to assign the batch class to the material master and then every batch that has been created with this material has automatically batch class gets assigned.

My questions:

  1. Is it possible to assign class automatically to the every serial number/ equipment? If yes, then how?
  2. Is there any other alternative to reduce the above manual work?

I look forward to your feedback and thank you in advance for your support.

Thanks in advance,
Suyog

entry.title: Re: SAP instance reached state SHUTDOWN after having stat...
entry.content:
Now getting below error from dev_w2 file. Please adivse 

 

B Thu Dec 12 18:05:21:538 2024 B dbsync[db_syexe]: wait=0, call_no=17, current_ts=20241212180521, last_counter=-2147483648 E E Thu Dec 12 18:06:21:546 2024 E Enqueue Info: enque/use_pfclock2 = FALSE E Profile-Parameter: enque/sync_dequeall = 0 B B Thu Dec 12 18:07:21:539 2024 B dbsync[db_syexe]: wait=0, call_no=18, current_ts=20241212180721, last_counter=-2147483648

entry.title: SAP Connect
entry.content:
Participate in our brand-new yearly event to enhance your knowledge in SAP technologies, discover novel innovations, and understand how solutions within SAP's integrated suite collaborate to achieve improved business results.

Find more information here.

entry.title: input field editable when check box is ticked.
entry.content:
Hi All,

In CJ20n Project Builder, when i click the check box value from user status, i want a WBS field editable. 

It is standard program, so i have to do enhancement, 

Can you guide me where we exactly do enhancement? in PBO or PAI of the WBS field screen?

if so, please suggest me after what logic we can add the new peace of code which can help us to make field editable(it also needed that if user edit the WBS number that value need to update related database table, )

Note. Project is ALE distributed So is it cause any issue if user change WBS number after releasing the project?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content: have you ever redefined one? it gives you option to take over the url when you do the "redefine""

entry.title: Key Links & Notes for SAP Forecasting and Replenishment at Your Fingertips!
entry.content:
Dear SAP F&R community,

in this blog I would like to highlight some important links and notes for SAP Forecasting and Replenishment and the add-on for Fresh.  Most of them are not new,  but it might be helpful to have them handy! If I forgot one of your favorites, please let me know!

General information

  • Online Help: SAP F&R 5.2   SAP F&R, add-on for fresh products
  • SAP F&R  and Fresh maintenance options, details see
    • SAP’s maintenance strategy  Note 1648480   
      SAP F&R Note 2240592
    • Maintenance Phases
    • Product Availability Matrix SAP F&R
    • Product Availability Matrix Fresh
  • Schedules for SAP Support Package Stack 
  • Sizing: helps you find sizing estimations for SAP F&R 5.2 (including update for SAP HANA and Fresh Add-on)
  • Training: Check out the SAP Retail Learning journey that includes SAP F&R
  • Check every quarter for smaller and bigger improvements in note  2335048 this new collective note '’F&R improvements and recommendations'  which will be updated on a regular basis
    Latest improvements in more detail see also this blog

Useful single notes

  • SAP F&R Configuration Guide: Note 2393815
  • Note 1588213 - Implementation recommendations for SAP F&R 5.2 on SCM 7.02 and 7.14 
  • SAP F&R powered by UDF (Unified Demand Forecast) – something to consider in your SAP F&R implementation because it delivery great value!
    • Check out note 2367172 that contains a detailed integration guide
      SAP Customer Activity Repository Online Help including UDF
    • Also around UDF: Note 3484728  contains a link to a CARAB Wiki  page about - DDF/PMR/UDF
  • Connectivity: Mapping Documentation for SAP ERP 6.0 EhP 6 for Retail / SAP F&R 5.2: Note 1658548  contains information for the data transformation and transmission between SAP ERP 6.0 EhP 6 for Retail and SAP F&R 5.2
  • Connectivity: SAP F&R 5.2 / API Documentation : Read note 1657947  if you want to use SAP F&R integrated with any other ERP than SAP Retail
  • Connectivity: Check reports operation guide:  Note 1387699 documents how the check reports work and how they have to be operated.  
  • 1433834 F&R Scheduling: technical documentation
  • 2955294 F&R Processor Administration Settings - technical documentation
  • 1361833 Significance of time series types in SAP F&R - tech. documentation

entry.title: Asset Class (4001 Inv. Measure Tang) does not allowing line items to Settle AUC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are managing AUC with Investment project using Asset class 4001 which does not have check mark for Line item Settlement in the Asset Class and the Standard Asset Class 4001 is assigned to the investment profile 00001

Created Project in App : Project Control - Enterprise Projects, 

System Generated AUC Asset Code Automatically

But when i am creating the Settlement Rule for the Same AUC Asset Code System is Showing the Below Error.

Asset is investment measure, transaction type is not allowed. message no. AK005

Could you please advice on how to settle line items to an AUC using a investment measure profile.

If this is not feasible could you suggest an alternative method for settling the line items to AUC Asset.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: DO NOT Install BusinessObjects BI 4.3 SP04 or 4.3 SP04 Patch 1
entry.content:
@adende Please check firewall settings about the BODS server's CMS (CentralManagementServer) "Request Port".

You can  use (on client) telnet host port (or telnet host:port on Unix systems) to see if the connection is refused, accepted, or timeouts.

entry.title: A/p Down Payment Pending Invoice
entry.content:
Hi

  I want simple Addon through which when A/p invoice is created and there are pending A/p Down Payment Advices for that customer then a message should be displayed.

Thanks

entry.title: Delete Primary Values from Numeric Point Chart
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

in my story i have a numeric point chart with three primary values. With a button click i want to remove the three values and add two other ones.

does anybody know how i have to wright the script, that this will work?

unfortunately, everything i tried does not work.

thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning BPC live model - Publish data from the s...
entry.content:
Hi Rubén,

Can you try the following code instead of yours? This might help you.

if(BPC_PlanningSequence.execute().status === BpcPlanningSequenceExecutionResponseStatus.Success);

{var bpcVersion = Table_1.getPlanning().getPublicVersion("All Versions");
if (bpcVersion) {
if(bpcVersion.isDirty()) {
bpcVersion.publish();
};
};}

Best regards,

Tuncay.

entry.title: Hi there, I have a challenge while integrating SAP JCo (3.1.10) into a Maven. Naming not allowed
entry.content:
My issue is integrating SAP JCo (version 3.1.10) into a Maven-based Java project, specifically for creating a custom NiFi processor.

Despite attempts to use Maven's maven-dependency-plugin with configurations like stripVersion or destFileName to rename the jar back to sapjco3.jar during the build process, the issue persists. This causes the following runtime error:

java.lang.ExceptionInInitializerError: Illegal JCo archive "sapjco3-3.1.10.jar". It is not allowed to rename or repackage the original archive "sapjco3.jar".
QUESTIONS:
1. Maven Integration: Is there an officially recommended approach to integrate SAP JCo into Maven projects while following SAP's archive naming restrictions?
2. Runtime Compliance: Are there specific runtime configurations, environment variables, or Java options that could help resolve this issue?
3. Artifact Packaging: How should the sapjco3.jar be handled in scenarios where it needs to be included as part of a deployable archive (e.g., NiFi’s NAR format)?
4. Future Enhancements: Given the challenges of using JCo with Maven, are there any plans for SAP to release Maven-compatible artifacts or documentation addressing these issues?

entry.title: SAP TechEd
entry.content:
Join to get updates for SAP TechEd in Berlin and Virtual!

Simply complete and submit the form and we will be in touch once SAP TechEd plans for the 2025 season have been finalized and registration opens.

Thank you for your interest in the SAP TechEd Program.

entry.title: Load SAPUI5 library from Cordova container
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We're currently deploying a Fiori standalone app to the BTP Cloud Foundry with an approuter to enable a static URL for our application. Due to performance issues when running on mobile devices with low bandwidth, we figured we could create a Cordova app that uses its in-app browser to open the web app and load only the SAPUI5 library files from local device storage.

We referenced sap-ui-core.js like so:

 

<script id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
	src="https://localhost/sapui5/sap-ui-core.js"
	data-sap-ui-theme="sap_belize_plus"
	data-sap-ui-resourceroots='{"com.example.app": "./"}'
	data-sap-ui-compatVersion="edge"
	data-sap-ui-oninit="module:sap/ui/core/ComponentSupport"
	data-sap-ui-async="true"
	data-sap-ui-frameOptions="trusted">
</script>

 

Unfortunately, some files are not being loaded due to issues with CORS. Strangely enough, only some files like messagebundle.properties or sap/ui/thirdparty/datajs.js are affected. sap-ui-core.js and most other files are loaded successfully.

What are we missing?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: The 2H 2024 Release of SAP SuccessFactors Learning – Key Highlights
entry.content:
We are also experiencing a long lag with items and classes appearing for employees to search in the new learning experience.  I found an enhancement request for this however this is very problematic when creating classes.  Does anyone have a workaround for this? 

Here is the enhancement link, please vote for this: Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

entry.title: Re: gs_usbapilink-bapilink is initial: what does it mean?
entry.content: Thanks Erol

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields and Logics - Create and Capturing the Changes into Transport Request
entry.content: Thank you for the wonderful blog.

entry.title: Re: input field editable when check box is ticked.
entry.content:
Is this field a standard field, is it already input allowed by standard.

  • Check also OPUJ, OPUK / SPRO for WBS modifiable fields, Field Selection for Work Breakdown Structures
  • Look at form MODULE modif_pbo of function group (there should be an ENHANCEMENT-POINT available)
  • You could read status from memory buffer with FM such as STATUS_READ or STATUS_CHANGES_GET

entry.title: Re: Service entry sheet deleted but not in PO history
entry.content: Correction done, thanks for the help. The application of the reports that was in that note, solved the problem.

entry.title: Re: How to extend the size of an Existing table using ABAP2XLSX
entry.content:
@Sandra.rossi, thank you for your response.

Here is a sample code snippet from what I want:

DATA:
lo_writer TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_writer_2007,
lo_reader TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_reader_2007,
lo_excel TYPE REF TO zcl_excel,
lo_worksheet TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_worksheet,
lo_columns TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_columns,
lo_column TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_column,
lo_style TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_style,
sheet_id TYPE i.

" Instantiates Excel reader object.
CREATE OBJECT lo_reader TYPE /orbit/cl_x_reader_2007.

" Loads data from provided xstring in /ALLEVO/CL_N_EXCEL format
lo_excel = lo_reader->/orbit/if_x_reader~load( excel_data ).

lo_worksheet = lo_excel->get_worksheet_by_index( iv_index = 1 ).

lo_worksheet->set_table(
ip_table = it_data
ip_table_title = mv_tablename
ip_top_left_column = min_col
ip_top_left_row = row ).

" Save the changes to the Excel file
lo_excel->save

  • Is it possible now to extend the tables of the existing workbook?

entry.title: Re: invisible Import settings for public dimension SAP SAC
entry.content: Thanks for reply. understood but , whenever changing dimension structure , do we need to create transformations from scratch again ?

entry.title: Subcontracting scenario using ME2O
entry.content:
Hello Guys, hope you´re all doing fine.

I have a scenario of subcontrating, where whe create the delivery to the supplier in ME2O.

My material price, is controlled by Moving Average Price. And when i create some deliverys, the value of the material that i bought, is not the same of the delivery. 

Because i buy this material, and i do not receive in my deposit, is sent direct to my supplier of subcontracting.

Question, exist the possibility of changing the pricing of the delivery in ME2O, to standard cost, but only of the delivery ? Not changing the price of the material to Standard.

If there is, how can i change the pricing of ME2O.

Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: Schedule Post Closing and Opening Balances - Italy
entry.content:
Hi Kamil,

Now I copied the Help Portal Documentation link again, since this is for Italy,

Schedule Post Closing and Opening Balances | SAP Help Portal

To ensure that the posting logic meets the legal requirements for Italy, make sure that you do the following:

  • In the app, you must use the variant SAP&ITALY (Standard Variant for Italy) or a modified copy of this variant.

  • In the scheduling app, instead of selecting a variant, you must select the country/region-specific job template Closing/Opening Postings at Year End (Italy).

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Can anyone explain the use of user exit SC010 in substitution
entry.content:
HI Team 

can anyone explain why SC010 user exit is assigned in substitution rule and what is the use of it. In which tcode SC010 user exit substitution is performed?

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: FLP: How to Disable 'Search' in the Shell Bar for Specific Applications/Catalogs Only
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking for a way to disable the search functionality in the shell bar of the Fiori Launchpad, but only for specific applications or catalogs.

So far we've managed to disable search globally via transaction /UI2/FLP_CUS_CONF by specifying SEARCH option as false

I also tried to disable it in a catalog via target mapping for application by using parameter "renderers/fiori2/componentData/config/enableSearch" as false, but this one did not work at all.

I was only able to disable it by creating a separate target mapping and specifying semantic object as Shell and action as bootConfig and adding the parameter that I had used before, but this worked on a global level again.

Our current SAP_UI version is 758.

 Is there a way to disable the search functionality in the FLP shell bar specifically for selected applications or catalogs, rather than globally?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: REFX Lease Liability Entry
entry.content:
Dear Team 

In REFX module for reduction in lease liability entries are getting posted in the system but against the expense GL , cost centre is not getting displayed. From configuration perspective need to know all the steps to get the cost center at the expense line item level.

Thanks

Viral Guruji

entry.title: Re: It has never been easier to print from SAP with Microsoft Universal Print
entry.content:
Hey @Martin-Frick, hope you are enjoying down under.

Microsoft Universal print as per our docs article uses the browser and OS functionalities for cloud printing from Fiori apps. What made you think otherwise? Do we need to update materials maybe?

KR Martin

entry.title: XML Namespace Error with XPATH condition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have below as the content which needs to be routed based on the field 'Message' value. 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
  <code>06/019</code>
  <message xml:lang="en">Document  does not exist</message>
  <innererror>
    <application>
      <component_id/>
      <service_namespace>/SAP/</service_namespace>
      <service_id>TEST</service_id>
      <service_version>0001</service_version>
    </application>
    <transactionid>d828d56baed54a718432432e7cd27533</transactionid>
    <timestamp/>
    <Error_Resolution>
      <SAP_Transaction/>
      <SAP_Note>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)</SAP_Note>
    </Error_Resolution>
    <errordetails>
      <errordetail>
        <ContentID/>
        <code>06/033</code>
        <message>Document  does not exist</message>
        <propertyref/>
        <severity>error</severity>
        <target/>
        <transition>false</transition>
      </errordetail>
    </errordetails>
  </innererror>
</error>

 

Tried the condition = //innererror/errordetails/errordetail[contains(message, 'Document')]

Somehow, it is not working due to the namespace. I've also added the namespace in the runtime configuration as xmlns=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata Still getting invalid namespace declared error. 

Appreciate your valuable inputs and support. 

Thanks,

Barath Vivekanandan

entry.title: Re: Output variables of added Action in a process don't m...
entry.content: I found the answer - some of the output variables were somehow generated without type. Since the output couldn't be changed after the fact in the action project I completley redid them and made sure to define a type and it now works.

entry.title: Re: General ledger distribution and assessment
entry.content:
Hi Dalao,

The tags on your questions are for SAP S/4HANA Cloud; however, in this case, the Tcode = App ID F3338 is the same for Private and Public.

You can check this information in the SAP Fiori Library: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F3338')/S33

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: Payment run; clearing journal entry
entry.content: Hi Ivangomez

entry.title: Re: Asset Class (4001 Inv. Measure Tang) does not allowin...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check following KBA note and also check the linked blogs in it.

3535726 - Investment Project settlement divided into AUC and Cost Center

You cannot settle the AUC directly but with the cost object such as the investment project/WBS/investment internal order.

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Re: Adobe Forms Barcode is printed over Border
entry.content: Thats the problem. If I pull it to wide it gets printed over the edge if i pull it to small it is to small to scan without a hassel. It only got those two states it does not size to the size I gave the barcode in the designer.

entry.title: Re: How to extend the size of an Existing table using ABAP2
entry.content: ACC testing 123

entry.title: Re: Build failing in CICD with SAP Fiori in the Cloud Foundry environment Pipeline
entry.content: This worked for me too! Thanks a lot 🙂

entry.title: Sysdate On default Prompt Date on SAP Universe
entry.content:
Hello, 

I would like to have the sysdate by default on my prompt universe filter ?
How do I do for this ?

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
I have a few ideas I am trying and will let you know the outcome.  Good luck with your tests and lets hope dev can resolve the issue.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: XML Namespace Error with XPATH condition
entry.content: I think you would need to anonymize the XML for your expression to work because it doesn't expect use of a namespace without a prefix.  I tested several variations and none of them work for a namespace without a prefix.

entry.title: SAP Fieldglass - Quick Win Features
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Welcome to the first episode of my blog! My name is Fabian Caelers, and I've been working with the SAP Fieldglass solution for about six years. I have been implementing Fieldglass projects for our customers in the past 2.5 years in Delivery at SAP and prior to that, in consulting and managing an MSP Program for a customer.

This blog is designed to provide Fieldglass users with valuable tips and tricks for system usage. While some of these tips may be helpful for the typical day-to-day user, the majority will focus on quick-win configuration changes and updates. These changes are sure to have an immediate impact and enhance the solution's functionality. We have noticed that some of our customers struggle to utilize the solution to its full potential and that some enhancements made over the past few years often go unnoticed.

To address this, we are starting this series to encourage you to familiarize yourself with different Fieldglass functionalities and features. Each episode will introduce around three functionalities. To kick things off, I will focus on features from the most recent major release this past November.

Activity Item Checklists

This functionality allows Buyers and Suppliers to group Activity Items into levels within an Activity Checklist. Multiple Activity Items can be completed simultaneously before advancing to the next level. This update ensures that each onboarding step is completed in the proper sequence and that essential tasks, such as training or documentation completion, are fulfilled before granting workers access to sensitive information or systems. For further instructions on how to benefit from this feature, check out the link below:
Activity Item Checklist Levels | SAP Help Portal

Auto-Generate Security ID

This new company sub-configuration allows a Security ID to be automatically generated from a Buyer-defined pattern based on a combination of native SAP Fieldglass fields and required custom fields. Different patterns can be defined for each country/region or for all Security IDs. This new sub-configuration minimizes the risk of incorrect Security ID entry by Buyer and Supplier users, which can negatively impact key features such as Consolidated Worker Records, Potential Matches, and Tenure Policy Management.

Discussions around Security IDs are common in most implementation projects I've been part of, so this is a significant improvement. However, this enhancement is more beneficial for new customers than for existing ones, as it does not consider any entered IDs from historical or recent workers, which may lead to inconsistencies.

  • Security ID Pattern | SAP Help Portal
  • Defining an Auto-generated Security ID Pattern | SAP Help Portal

Allow Clickable Hyperlinks

Though not necessarily a feature that needs to be activated, it’s important to note: When a custom field or chat message contains a hyperlink, the link is now directly clickable within the Fieldglass application. This feature allows customers to store URLs in custom fields across various modules within Fieldglass, linking to other tools used in their processes and enhancing user experience. It works only for Text Area data type custom fields, and if your company has an Allowed URL List, only the listed URLs will work. If not, all URLs will be allowed. This feature is also compatible with data uploads. Importantly, it does not impact existing functionality of Integration uploads with the allow_html_tags_in_value_flag at the custom field level – these will remain unchanged.

Thank you for taking the time to read my blog. Stay tuned for the next episode, and until then, enjoy the holiday season!

entry.title: Re: Display a message from Custom Entity / Query Implemen...
entry.content: Does anyone know if there is a solution in the meantime?

entry.title: 🇪🇸 Service integration with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (Madrid, Spain)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam introduces attendees to service integration with the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP). Specifically, the Node.js flavor of CAP is used.

During this event, you'll become acquainted with how external services can be integrated and consumed from within a CAP project. In working through the exercises you'll also become comfortable with various facilities that CDS offers for declaring, relating and exposing entities, and familiar with how the SAP Cloud SDK covers connectivity and destinations, supporting such integration scenarios with CAP.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Thursday 20 Mar 2025 in Madrid, Spain. It is part of the SIT Madrid 2025 event that is running the day after. The event will be at the SAP office in Madrid.

The instructor is Developer Advocate DJ Adams. 

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-service-integration-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page. Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 30 attendees for this event. In that context, if you indicate that you're attending and later realise you can't, please remove your name so that others get a chance instead. Thanks!

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.
